history.qwen_observation: The first step failed with an IllegalAccessError inside OpenRewrite's internal Guava migration classes, indicating a classloader or module isolation conflict in the plugin environment.
history.qwen_rationale: By removing the initial Lombok bump step and starting directly with the Java 21 build and plugin upgrades, we bypass the immediate recipe-loading conflict. The Lombok version bump will be applied in a later step after the build environment is successfully transitioned to JDK 21.

history.qwen_observation: Recipe apply failed with IllegalAccessError in OpenRewrite's internal Guava migration recipe, caused by classloader isolation under JDK 17.
history.qwen_rationale: Replacing the composite UpgradeBuildToJava21 recipe with explicit plugin and property updates avoids loading the problematic internal Guava recipe. This ensures the pom.xml updates cleanly under JDK 17, after which the chain switches to JDK 21 for compilation and code transforms.

history.qwen_observation: Recipe application crashed with IllegalAccessError due to a classloader isolation bug in rewrite-maven-plugin:6.40.0 when executed on JDK 17.
history.qwen_rationale: Switching the OpenRewrite execution environment to JDK 21 bypasses the Maven classworlds and module visibility conflicts that trigger the IllegalAccessError on JDK 17, allowing the plugin to load and apply recipes successfully.
